summary: Completed iteration 7 testing for Simplifii EdTech app. All new features working correctly: Versioning System (V1 Quick Scan, V2 Deep Dive, V3 Expert Analysis) on Brief Simplifier, Study Buddy AI Chat (persistent widget across all pages), Landing page redesigned with 'From surviving to thriving' tagline, 8 tools grid, AI disclaimer in footer and mobile nav menu. Backend tests 100% pass (13/13). Frontend tests 100% pass.
passed_tests: Login with test@simplifii.com / test123 → redirects to /dashboard
Landing page (/) shows 'From surviving to thriving' heading
Landing page shows 8 tool cards in grid
Landing page has AI disclaimer in footer
Landing page has privacy section 'Your Data Stays Yours'
Brief Simplifier (/brief-simplifier) shows Analysis Depth selector with 3 options
V1 Quick Scan option shows '1 ticket' cost
V2 Deep Dive option shows '1 ticket' cost
V3 Expert Analysis option shows '2 tickets' cost
Deep Dive (V2) is selected by default on Brief Simplifier
Study Buddy trigger button visible on /dashboard (purple circle, bottom-right)
Clicking Study Buddy trigger opens chat window with greeting message
Study Buddy input field accepts text
Study Buddy send button works and AI responds
Backend POST /api/study-buddy/chat with {message, session_id} returns AI response
Backend POST /api/briefs/upload accepts depth_level form field
Ticket bundle page (/credits) shows 3 tiers: Starter Pack, Semester Saver, All-Access Pass
Mobile nav menu has AI disclaimer text at bottom
critical_code_review_comments: Landing.js correctly implements 'From surviving to thriving' hero heading with gradient styling
Landing.js has 8 tool cards in grid layout with proper icons and descriptions
Landing.js footer includes AI disclaimer text
Landing.js has privacy section with 'Your Data Stays Yours' heading
BriefSimplifier.js has depth selector with 3 options (v1, v2, v3) using data-testid attributes
BriefSimplifier.js defaults depthLevel state to 'v2' (Deep Dive)
BriefSimplifier.js correctly shows '2 tickets' cost for Expert Analysis (v3)
StudyBuddy.js renders globally in App.js and only shows when user is authenticated
StudyBuddy.js has proper data-testid attributes for trigger, window, input, send button
Navigation.js mobile menu includes AI disclaimer at bottom
Backend server.py has /api/study-buddy/chat endpoint at line 718
Backend server.py upload_brief accepts depth_level form field with default 'v2'
seed_data_creation: Used existing briefs 'Test Brief' and 'Marketing Strategy Essay' for testing

mocked_apis.Stripe: Credit check bypassed for owner testing - payments still create real Stripe checkout sessions
mocked_apis.Study Buddy: Uses real Emergent LLM Key (Claude Sonnet 4.5) - returns actual AI responses

context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 7 features verified working. Versioning System on Brief Simplifier has 3 depth levels: V1 Quick Scan (1 ticket), V2 Deep Dive (1 ticket, default), V3 Expert Analysis (2 tickets). Study Buddy AI Chat is a persistent widget that renders globally when user is authenticated - uses Emergent LLM Key for real AI responses. Landing page redesigned with 'From surviving to thriving' tagline, 8 tools grid, AI disclaimer in footer. Mobile nav menu has AI disclaimer at bottom. GuidedTour uses localStorage (simplifii_tour_brief) so it only shows once per user.

versioning_system.details: Brief Simplifier has Analysis Depth selector with V1 Quick Scan, V2 Deep Dive (default), V3 Expert Analysis. V3 costs 2 tickets, others cost 1 ticket.

study_buddy_chat.details: Purple trigger button visible on dashboard, opens chat window with greeting, input accepts text, send button works, AI responds with helpful guidance

landing_page_redesign.details: Hero heading 'From surviving to thriving', 8 tool cards grid, AI disclaimer in footer, privacy section

mobile_nav_ai_disclaimer.details: Mobile nav menu shows AI disclaimer text at bottom: 'AI-enhanced accessibility tool. Outputs are AI-generated — always verify with your institution.'

ticket_bundle_page.details: 3 tiers: Starter Pack (5/$7.50), Semester Saver (15/$15 BEST VALUE), All-Access Pass (30/$25)

tickets_terminology.details: Nav shows 'tickets' label, Credits page shows 'Grab Your Tickets' header
